MASTER MOTION CALENDAR ON JUN-07-2012 IN 206, PLAINTIFF'S MOTION TO CONTINUE TRIAL DATE WITH STIPULATION. BRYAN LAMB APPEARING FOR PLAINTIFF. NO OTHER APPEARANCES ON THIS MATTER. NO OPPOSITION FILED. THE COURT GRANTS PLAINTIFF'S MOTION TO CONTINUE THE TRIAL DATE. THE COURT FINDS GOOD CAUSE TO CONTINUE THE TRIAL DATE BECAUSE PLAINTIFF IS INCARCERATED IN FEDERAL PRISON. THE TRIAL DATE OF 6/18/12 IS CONTINUED TO 11/13/12 AT 9:30AM IN DEPT. 206 PURSUANT TO THE STIPULATION. ALL DISCOVERY SHALL TRACK THE NEW TRIAL DATE. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. JUDGE: MARLA J. MILLER; CLERK: R. VELUZ; MATTER NOT REPORTED. (206)
